query:
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  pc.partnerId,
  pc.cityId,
  pc.contractStatus,
  c.id as city_id,
  c.name as cityName
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.partnerId = 30002 AND pc.contractStatus = 'active';
